languages.text: {n}Ваш ответный удар приходится в грудь Батошски. Любой другой на его месте взвыл бы от боли, но старый солдат лишь хрипло рычит, игнорируя кровавую пену на губах.{/n}
{n}Your counter-attack hits Batoshski square in the chest. Any other man would have howled in pain, but the old soldier only lets out a raspy snarl, ignoring the bloody froth on his lips.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Ваш ответный удар приходится в грудь Батошски. Любой другой на его месте взвыл бы от боли, но старый солдат лишь хрипло рычит, игнорируя кровавую пену на губах.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Your counter-strike hits Batoshski square in the chest. Any other man would have howled in pain, but the old soldier only lets out a raspy snarl, ignoring the bloody froth on his lips.{/n}
{n}Your counter-attack hits Batoshski square in the chest. Any other man would have howled in pain, but the old soldier only lets out a raspy snarl, ignoring the bloody froth on his lips.{/n}
{n}You slam your shoulder into Batoshski's chest, dropping your knife, but forcing your opponent to release his weapon as well.{/n}
{n}Your counter-strike hits Batoshski square in the chest. Any other man would have howled in pain, but the old soldier only lets out a raspy snarl, ignoring the bloody froth on his lips.{/n}

languages.text: {n}バトシュスキーの胸に肩をぶつけ、ナイフを落としたが、相手も武器を放した。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You slam your shoulder into Batoshski's chest, dropping your knife, but forcing your opponent to release his weapon as well.{/n}

traits.locale_text: バトシュスキーの胸に肩をぶつけ、ナイフを落としたが、相手も武器を放した。

languages.text: {n}Votre contre-attaque frappe Batoshski en pleine poitrine. N'importe quel homme aurait hurlé de douleur, mais le vieux briscard esquisse un rictus moqueur, faisant fi de l'écume ensanglantée qui coule de ses lèvres.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your counter-attack hits Batoshski square in the chest. Any other man would have howled in pain, but the old soldier only lets out a raspy snarl, ignoring the bloody froth on his lips.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Votre contre-attaque frappe Batoshski en pleine poitrine. N'importe quel homme aurait hurlé de douleur, mais le vieux briscard esquisse un rictus moqueur, faisant fi de l'écume ensanglantée qui coule de ses lèvres.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Karşı saldırın, Batoshski'nin tam göğsüne isabet ediyor. Başkası olsa acı içinde çığlık atacakken ihtiyar asker, dudaklarındaki kanlı köpüğü görmezden gelerek hırıltıyla homurdanıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your counter-attack hits Batoshski square in the chest. Any other man would have howled in pain, but the old soldier only lets out a raspy snarl, ignoring the bloody froth on his lips.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Karşı saldırın, Batoshski'nin tam göğsüne isabet ediyor. Başkası olsa acı içinde çığlık atacakken ihtiyar asker, dudaklarındaki kanlı köpüğü görmezden gelerek hırıltıyla homurdanıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Dein Gegenangriff trifft Batoshskis Brust. Jeder andere Mann hätte vor Schmerz aufgeheult, aber der alte Soldat stößt nur ein heiseres Knurren aus und ignoriert das Blut auf seinen Lippen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your counter-attack hits Batoshski square in the chest. Any other man would have howled in pain, but the old soldier only lets out a raspy snarl, ignoring the bloody froth on his lips.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Dein Gegenangriff trifft Batoshskis Brust. Jeder andere Mann hätte vor Schmerz aufgeheult, aber der alte Soldat stößt nur ein heiseres Knurren aus und ignoriert das Blut auf seinen Lippen.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Tu contraataque golpea a Batoshski en el pecho. Cualquier otro hombre habría aullado de dolor, pero el viejo soldado solo deja escapar un gruñido ronco e ignora la espuma sanguinolenta de sus labios.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your counter-attack hits Batoshski square in the chest. Any other man would have howled in pain, but the old soldier only lets out a raspy snarl, ignoring the bloody froth on his lips.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Tu contraataque golpea a Batoshski en el pecho. Cualquier otro hombre habría aullado de dolor, pero el viejo soldado solo deja escapar un gruñido ronco e ignora la espuma sanguinolenta de sus labios.{/n}

languages.text: {n}你的反击正中巴托什斯基的胸口。换作其他人早就痛得惨叫了，但这个老兵只是发出一声沙哑的嘶吼，毫不在意嘴角的血沫。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your counter-attack hits Batoshski square in the chest. Any other man would have howled in pain, but the old soldier only lets out a raspy snarl, ignoring the bloody froth on his lips.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}你的反击正中巴托什斯基的胸口。换作其他人早就痛得惨叫了，但这个老兵只是发出一声沙哑的嘶吼，毫不在意嘴角的血沫。{/n}
